The '''Analysis Bureau''', was a branch of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] responsible for analyzing data and compiling reports for senior personnel and government representatives.

==Known Members==
*[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Trennt Ferinn]]
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Baden Lathe]]
